name: twork/neuro-faq-item
title: FAQ Item
description: Single FAQ item (question + answer) for the Neuro Centre Common Questions section. Add, remove, or reorder via the block list.

question.default: What are the signs of a Stroke (FAST)?

answer.default: Face drooping, Arm weakness, Speech difficulty, Time to call 09-789 101 101 immediately. Immediate treatment is crucial.

attributes.question: What are the signs of a Stroke (FAST)?
attributes.answer: Face drooping, Arm weakness, Speech difficulty, Time to call 09-789 101 101 immediately. Immediate treatment is crucial.
